ingredients_text: BATTERED POTATO FRIES (64%) (Potato, Sunflower Oil, Modified Potato Starch, Rice Flour, Potato Starch, Salt, Dextrin, Raising Agents: Diphosphates, Sodium Carbonates; Thickener: Xanthan Gum; Dextrose, Paprika Extract, Turmeric Extract), BEEF GRAVY (20%) (Water, Onion, Modified Maize Starch, Yeast Extract (contains _Barley_), Sugar, Salt, _Barley_ Malt Extract, Yeast Extract Powder, Flavouring, Caramelised Sugar, Red Wine Extract, Mushroom Concentrate, Black Pepper, Beef Fat, Beef, Beef Bone Stock), CHEESE SAUCE (16%) [Whole _Milk_, Water, Single Cream (_Milk_), Mature Cheddar Cheese (_Milk_), Modified Maize Starch, Mozzarella Cheese (_Milk_), Thickener: Guar Gum; Flavouring, Cornflour, Cheese Powder (_Milk_), Wheat Flour (_Wheat_ Flour, Calcium Carbonate, Iron, Niacin, Thiamin), Salt, Dried Glucose Syrup, Dextrose, Yeast Extract Powder, Skimmed Milk Powder, Sugar, Whey Powder (_Milk_), Acidity Regulator: Citric Acid; Colour: Annatto Norbixin; _Mustard_ Powder, White Pepper].
